products.title: Pierre Cardin | Home Fragrance WHITE JASMINE | 100 ml
products.body_html:
Pierre Cardin Room Odor Reed Diffuser

Enhance every corner of your home, office, and all living spaces with the Pierre Cardin Room Odor Reed Diffuser, designed to create an enjoyable atmosphere with its pleasant and beautiful scent.

Instructions for Use:

  1. Remove the product from the box.
  2. Take off the cap and the stopper of the bottle.
  3. Insert the bamboo sticks into the bottle. The sticks will absorb the fragrance oil and begin to release a pleasant aroma into the air.
  4. Adjust the intensity of the fragrance by varying the number of sticks used. For optimal performance, we recommend turning the sticks over once a week.

Warnings:

  • Read the instructions carefully before use.
  • Keep out of reach of children.
  • Avoid use in the presence of pregnant women, infants, or individuals with respiratory conditions.
  • Keep away from food items.
  • Avoid direct inhalation and contact with skin; may cause an allergic reaction.
  • Protect from direct sunlight.

Consumer's Attention:

  • This product contains highly flammable liquid and vapor. Keep away from heat, hot surfaces, sparks, open flames, and other ignition sources. No smoking near the diffuser.
  • Toxic to aquatic life with long-lasting effects. Handle spills promptly and avoid releasing to the environment.

In case of skin contact: Wash with plenty of soap and water.

In case of eye contact: Rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing.

Disposal: Dispose of contents/container in accordance with local/national regulations.

Pierre Cardin Protein Therapy CC Hair Conditioner

Pierre Cardin Protein Therapy CC Hair Conditioner provides 10-in-1 complete care for your hair. products.title: Pierre Cardin | Hand & Nail Cream | Rose Beauty | 75 ml
products.body_html:
Pierre Cardin Rose Beauty Hand Cream

Pierre Cardin Rose Beauty Hand Cream is enriched with Glycerin and Vitamin E to provide deep hydration and nourishment for your hands. This luxurious hand cream helps to moisturize, soften, and protect your skin, leaving it feeling silky smooth and rejuvenated with a delicate rose scent. The non-greasy formula absorbs quickly, making it perfect for daily use.

Volume: 75ml

Directions:

  1. Clean your hands thoroughly.
  2. Apply a small amount of hand cream to your hands.
  3. Massage gently until fully absorbed.
  4. Use as often as needed.

Warnings: For external use only. Avoid direct contact with eyes. Store at room temperature. Keep out of reach of children.

products.title: Pierre Cardin Gel Cologne | 100 ml
products.body_html:
Pierre Cardin Gel Cologne is a hand hygiene product containing 70% alcohol, enriched with glycerin. This gel provides effective sanitization without the need for rinsing, leaving hands feeling clean and refreshed.

Volume : 100ml

Mode d'emploi :

  1. Apply a small amount of gel to the palm of your hand.
  2. Rub your hands together, covering all surfaces, including between fingers and around nails.
  3. Continue rubbing until the gel is fully absorbed and hands are dry.
  4. Use as needed to sanitize hands.

Warnings : For external use only. Flammable. Keep away from heat and flame. Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse immediately with plenty of water. Keep out of reach of children. If irritation or discomfort persists, discontinue use and consult a doctor. Store in a cool, dry place.

products.body_html:
Pierre Cardin Home Fragrance - Sandalwood

Pierre Cardin Home Fragrance Sandalwood brings a woody and exotic scent to your home. Perfect for creating a tranquil and serene atmosphere.

Volume: 50ml

Instructions for Use:

  1. Remove the product from the box.
  2. Take off the cap and the stopper of the bottle.
  3. Insert the bamboo sticks into the bottle. The sticks will absorb the fragrance oil and begin to release a pleasant aroma into the air.
  4. Adjust the intensity of the fragrance by varying the number of sticks used. For optimal performance, we recommend turning the sticks over once a week.

Warnings:

  • Read the instructions carefully before use.
  • Keep out of reach of children.
  • Avoid use in the presence of pregnant women, infants, or individuals with respiratory conditions.
  • Keep away from food items.
  • Avoid direct inhalation and contact with skin; may cause an allergic reaction.
  • Protect from direct sunlight.

Consumer's Attention:

  • This product contains highly flammable liquid and vapor. Keep away from heat, hot surfaces, sparks, open flames, and other ignition sources. No smoking near the diffuser.
  • Toxic to aquatic life with long-lasting effects. Handle spills promptly and avoid releasing to the environment.

In case of skin contact: Wash with plenty of soap and water.

In case of eye contact: Rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing.

Disposal: Dispose of contents/container in accordance with local/national regulations.
